allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Create comprehensive epic and story breakdown for PPIProperties_Website

## Summary

Generated complete epic and story breakdown from PRD, Architecture, and UX Design specifications:

- **6 Epics** organized by user value: Project Initialization, Property Listing, Filtering, Details/Gallery/SEO, Engagement, Accessibility/Performance
- **27 User Stories** with detailed acceptance criteria
- **53 Functional Requirements** fully mapped to stories
- **50 UX Design Requirements** covered by specific implementations
- **21 Non-Functional Requirements** addressed across epics

## Epics Created

1. Project Initialization & Deployment Infrastructure \(6 stories\)
2. Property Listing & Discovery \(4 stories\)
3. Smart Property Filtering \(4 stories\)
4. Property Details, Image Gallery & SEO \(6 stories\)
5. Property Interaction & Engagement \(3 stories\)
6. Accessibility & Performance Excellence \(4 stories\)

## Implementation Ready

- All stories follow user-value-first approach
- No forward dependencies within epics
- Each story independently completable
- Clear acceptance criteria for development
- Architecture patterns enforced \(11ty, Tailwind CSS, vanilla JS\)
- Performance and accessibility built-in from start

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Create story file for 1.1: Initialize 11ty Project with Minimal Template

This comprehensive story document provides the developer with:
- Complete acceptance criteria and task breakdown
- Detailed technical requirements and architecture compliance notes
- Testing strategy and success metrics
- References to source documentation
- Build and development workflow setup

Also create sprint-status.yaml to track epic and story progress throughout development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Story 1.1: Initialize 11ty Project with Minimal Template

✅ Completed all 7 tasks:
1. Verified Node.js 24.11.1 \(≥18+\) and npm 11.6.2 \(≥8+\)
2. Initialized npm project and installed @11ty/eleventy v3.1.5
3. Created directory structure:
   - src/ \(templates and content\)
   - src/_data/ \(global data files for properties.json\)
   - src/_includes/ \(reusable components\)
4. Created .eleventy.js configuration file
5. Updated package.json with build and dev scripts
6. Created minimal src/index.html template
7. Verified all acceptance criteria:
   - npm run build: ✅ Generates _site/index.html \(0.90 seconds\)
   - npm run dev: ✅ Starts server on http://localhost:8080/
   - Project structure: ✅ Matches architecture requirements
   - Build output: ✅ Valid HTML in _site/ directory

All prerequisites met for Story 1.2 \(Excel → JSON pipeline\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
